properties.name: NoBAR
properties.description: Dimly lit, relaxed spot offering cocktails, pool & an indie/alt jukebox.

properties.name: Spin The Bottle Wine Studio
properties.description: Hybrid retail wine shop/wine bar featuring small production artisanal wines from around the world.

properties.name: Vermont Karaoke and Billiards
properties.description: 'Feature' should be Karoke, but that type does not exist.

properties.name: Skinny's Lounge
properties.description: Swanky, relaxed lounge with cocktails & live music in an open 1970s-inspired interior.

properties.name: Lowboy
properties.description: Lowboy is the standard for neighborhood hospitality in Echo Park. Creating community within our community through solid drinks and genuine fun. No themes, theatrics or gimmicks; just good times, good drinks and good company.

properties.name: Hop Merchants Bottle Shop and Taproom
Deus Ex Machina - Emporium Of Post Modern Activities
properties.wikimedia_commons: File:Deus Ex Machina - Emporium Of Post Modern Activities (Venice, L.A) with a Mark Twain quote (October 2024).jpg

properties.name: Eagle LA
properties.description: Premier leather bar. Established in 2006. One of LA's oldest gay bars. The bar was originally opened as the Outcast in 1968, then became the Gauntlet II in 1984 (for 22 years). In 2007, the name was change the Eagle LA.

properties.name: Little Joy
properties.description: An array of natural wines and local Californian beers, continuously reinventing itself. In 2023, Little Joy underwent extensive renovations aimed at making the bar more welcoming for everyone in a post-pandemic world.
